zavRad1

36548173 Rossini Marin

2025-03-05

Učitavanje prvih datasetova

Pred nama se nalazi dataset sa (ne)potpunim podacima svih NBA utakmica u povijesti lige.

nbagames <- read_csv("csv/game.csv")
## Rows: 65698 Columns: 55
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr  (10): team_abbreviation_home, team_name_home, game_id, matchup_home, wl...
## dbl  (44): season_id, team_id_home, min, fgm_home, fga_home, fg_pct_home, fg...
## dttm  (1): game_date
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
head(nbagames)
## # A tibble: 6 × 55
##   season_id team_id_home team_abbreviation_home team_name_home          game_id 
##       <dbl>        <dbl> <chr>                  <chr>                   <chr>   
## 1     21946   1610610035 HUS                    Toronto Huskies         0024600…
## 2     21946   1610610034 BOM                    St. Louis Bombers       0024600…
## 3     21946   1610610032 PRO                    Providence Steamrollers 0024600…
## 4     21946   1610610025 CHS                    Chicago Stags           0024600…
## 5     21946   1610610028 DEF                    Detroit Falcons         0024600…
## 6     21946   1610610026 CLR                    Cleveland Rebels        0024600…
## # ℹ 50 more variables: game_date <dttm>, matchup_home <chr>, wl_home <chr>,
## #   min <dbl>, fgm_home <dbl>, fga_home <dbl>, fg_pct_home <dbl>,
## #   fg3m_home <dbl>, fg3a_home <dbl>, fg3_pct_home <dbl>, ftm_home <dbl>,
## #   fta_home <dbl>, ft_pct_home <dbl>, oreb_home <dbl>, dreb_home <dbl>,
## #   reb_home <dbl>, ast_home <dbl>, stl_home <dbl>, blk_home <dbl>,
## #   tov_home <dbl>, pf_home <dbl>, pts_home <dbl>, plus_minus_home <dbl>,
## #   video_available_home <dbl>, team_id_away <dbl>, …
glimpse(nbagames)

##

S obzirom da nas zanimaju potpuniji podaci, koji su dostupni od sezone 1985/1986, ranije podatke ćemo ukloniti.

nbagamesClear <- nbagames %>% filter(complete.cases(nbagames))

Podjela na regularnu sezonu i playoff

Uklanjamo nepotrebne stupce i dijelimo dataset na regularnu sezonu i playoff. S obzirom na veću količinu podataka, mi ćemo promatrati podatke iz regularne sezone.

interval <- dmy("1.7.1985") %--% today()
nbagamesClear %>% filter(game_date %within% interval) -> nbaK
nbaK <- nbaK %>% select(-min, -video_available_home, -video_available_away)

nbaK %>% filter(season_id > 30000) -> nbaPlayoffs
nbaK %>% filter(season_id < 30000 & season_id > 20000) -> nbaRS
head(nbaRS)
## # A tibble: 6 × 52
##   season_id team_id_home team_abbreviation_home team_name_home         game_id  
##       <dbl>        <dbl> <chr>                  <chr>                  <chr>    
## 1     21985   1610612737 ATL                    Atlanta Hawks          00285000…
## 2     21985   1610612765 DET                    Detroit Pistons        00285000…
## 3     21985   1610612744 GOS                    Golden State Warriors  00285000…
## 4     21985   1610612751 NJN                    New Jersey Nets        00285000…
## 5     21985   1610612741 CHI                    Chicago Bulls          00285000…
## 6     21985   1610612757 POR                    Portland Trail Blazers 00285000…
## # ℹ 47 more variables: game_date <dttm>, matchup_home <chr>, wl_home <chr>,
## #   fgm_home <dbl>, fga_home <dbl>, fg_pct_home <dbl>, fg3m_home <dbl>,
## #   fg3a_home <dbl>, fg3_pct_home <dbl>, ftm_home <dbl>, fta_home <dbl>,
## #   ft_pct_home <dbl>, oreb_home <dbl>, dreb_home <dbl>, reb_home <dbl>,
## #   ast_home <dbl>, stl_home <dbl>, blk_home <dbl>, tov_home <dbl>,
## #   pf_home <dbl>, pts_home <dbl>, plus_minus_home <dbl>, team_id_away <dbl>,
## #   team_abbreviation_away <chr>, team_name_away <chr>, matchup_away <chr>, …

Dodavanje stupca gamesPlayed, numberOfWins, WinPCT

U ovom dijeli dodajem tri dodatna stupca koja će biti korisna u kasnijoj analizi:
1) gamesPlayedHome/Away - broj odigranih utakmica u tekućoj sezoni

  1. numberOfWinsHome/Away - broj pobjeda u tekućoj sezoni

  2. Home/AwayTeamWinPCT - postotak pobjeda momčadi u tekućoj sezoni, najbolji parametar za praćenje uspješnosti momčadi (jer obično ekipe nemaju uvijek jednak broj odigranih utakmica)

nbaRS %>% mutate(RowID = row_number()) %>%
  group_by(team_id_home, season_id) %>%
  arrange(game_date) %>%
  mutate(winHome = ifelse(wl_home == "W", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(numberofWinsHome = lag(cumsum(winHome), default = 0),
         CumHomeGames = row_number() - 1,
         HomeTeamPCT = ifelse(CumHomeGames > 0, numberofWinsHome / CumHomeGames, NA)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(team_id_away, season_id) %>%
  arrange(game_date) %>%
  mutate(winAway = ifelse(wl_away == "W", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(numberofWinsAway = lag(cumsum(winAway), default = 0),
         CumAwayGames = row_number() - 1,
         AwayTeamPCT = ifelse(CumAwayGames > 0, numberofWinsAway / CumAwayGames, NA)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(RowID) %>%
  select(-RowID, -winHome, -CumHomeGames, -winAway, -CumAwayGames)
## # A tibble: 41,853 × 56
##    season_id team_id_home team_abbreviation_home team_name_home         game_id 
##        <dbl>        <dbl> <chr>                  <chr>                  <chr>   
##  1     21985   1610612737 ATL                    Atlanta Hawks          0028500…
##  2     21985   1610612765 DET                    Detroit Pistons        0028500…
##  3     21985   1610612744 GOS                    Golden State Warriors  0028500…
##  4     21985   1610612751 NJN                    New Jersey Nets        0028500…
##  5     21985   1610612741 CHI                    Chicago Bulls          0028500…
##  6     21985   1610612757 POR                    Portland Trail Blazers 0028500…
##  7     21985   1610612739 CLE                    Cleveland Cavaliers    0028500…
##  8     21985   1610612752 NYK                    New York Knicks        0028500…
##  9     21985   1610612741 CHI                    Chicago Bulls          0028500…
## 10     21985   1610612742 DAL                    Dallas Mavericks       0028500…
## # ℹ 41,843 more rows
## # ℹ 51 more variables: game_date <dttm>, matchup_home <chr>, wl_home <chr>,
## #   fgm_home <dbl>, fga_home <dbl>, fg_pct_home <dbl>, fg3m_home <dbl>,
## #   fg3a_home <dbl>, fg3_pct_home <dbl>, ftm_home <dbl>, fta_home <dbl>,
## #   ft_pct_home <dbl>, oreb_home <dbl>, dreb_home <dbl>, reb_home <dbl>,
## #   ast_home <dbl>, stl_home <dbl>, blk_home <dbl>, tov_home <dbl>,
## #   pf_home <dbl>, pts_home <dbl>, plus_minus_home <dbl>, team_id_away <dbl>, …
pomocna_tablica <- nbaRS %>%
  mutate(
    team_id = team_id_home,
    opp_id = team_id_away,
    fgm = fgm_home,
    fga = fga_home,
    fg_pct = fg_pct_home,
    fg3m = fg3m_home,
    fg3a = fg3a_home,
    fg3_pct = fg3_pct_home,
    ftm = ftm_home,
    fta = fta_home,
    ft_pct = ft_pct_home,
    oreb = oreb_home,
    dreb = dreb_home,
    reb = reb_home,
    ast = ast_home,
    stl = stl_home,
    blk = blk_home,
    tov = tov_home,
    pf = pf_home,
    ptsScored = pts_home,
    ptsConceded = pts_away,
    plus_minus = plus_minus_home,
    wl = wl_home
  ) %>%
  select(game_date, season_id, team_id, opp_id, fgm, fga, fg_pct, fg3m, fg3a, fg3_pct, ftm, fta, ft_pct, oreb, dreb, reb, ast, stl, blk, tov, pf, ptsScored, ptsConceded, plus_minus, wl) %>%
  bind_rows(
    nbaRS %>%
      mutate(
        team_id = team_id_away,
        opp_id = team_id_home,
        fgm = fgm_away,
        fga = fga_away,
        fg_pct = fg_pct_away,
        fg3m = fg3m_away,
        fg3a = fg3a_away,
        fg3_pct = fg3_pct_away,
        ftm = ftm_away,
        fta = fta_away,
        ft_pct = ft_pct_away,
        oreb = oreb_away,
        dreb = dreb_away,
        reb = reb_away,
        ast = ast_away,
        stl = stl_away,
        blk = blk_away,
        tov = tov_away,
        pf = pf_away,
        ptsScored = pts_away,
        ptsConceded = pts_home,
        plus_minus = plus_minus_away,
        wl = wl_away
      ) %>%
      select(game_date, season_id, team_id, opp_id, fgm, fga, fg_pct, fg3m, fg3a, fg3_pct, ftm, fta, ft_pct, oreb, dreb, reb, ast, stl, blk, tov, pf, ptsScored, ptsConceded, plus_minus, wl)
  )
pomocna_tablica %>% mutate(RowID = row_number()) %>%
  group_by(team_id, season_id) %>%
  arrange(game_date) %>%
  mutate(win = ifelse(wl == "W", 1, 0),
         loss = ifelse(wl == "L", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(numberofWins = lag(cumsum(win), default = 0),
         numberofLost = lag(cumsum(loss), default = 0),
         CumGames = row_number() - 1,
         TeamWinPCT = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(numberofWins / CumGames, 3), NA),
         
         fgmTotal = lag(cumsum(fgm), default = 0),
         fgaTotal = lag(cumsum(fga), default = 0),
         fgPCT = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(fgmTotal / fgaTotal, 3), NA), #bitno
         fg3mTotal = lag(cumsum(fg3m), default = 0),
         fg3aTotal = lag(cumsum(fg3a), default = 0),
         fg3PCT = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(fg3mTotal / fg3aTotal, 3), NA), #bitno
         ftmTotal = lag(cumsum(ftm), default = 0),
         ftaTotal = lag(cumsum(fta), default = 0),
         ftPCT = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(ftmTotal / ftaTotal, 3), NA), #bitno
         
         orebTotal = lag(cumsum(oreb), default = 0),
         orebAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(orebTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         drebTotal = lag(cumsum(dreb), default = 0),
         drebAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(drebTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         rebTotal = lag(cumsum(reb), default = 0),
         rebAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(rebTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         astTotal = lag(cumsum(ast), default = 0),
         astAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(astTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         stlTotal = lag(cumsum(stl), default = 0),
         stlAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(stlTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         blkTotal = lag(cumsum(blk), default = 0),
         blkAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(blkTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         tovTotal = lag(cumsum(tov), default = 0),
         tovAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(tovTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         pfTotal = lag(cumsum(pf), default = 0),
         pfAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(pfTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         ptsScoredTotal = lag(cumsum(ptsScored), default = 0),
         ptsScoredAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(ptsScoredTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         ptsConcededTotal = lag(cumsum(ptsConceded), default = 0),
         ptsConcededAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(ptsConcededTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         plus_minusTotal = lag(cumsum(plus_minus), default = 0),
         plus_minusAvg = ifelse(CumGames > 0, round(plus_minusTotal / CumGames, 3), NA), #bitno
         ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% arrange(RowID) %>%
  select(-RowID, -win, -loss, -fgmTotal, -fgaTotal, -fg3mTotal, -fg3aTotal, -ftmTotal, -ftaTotal, -orebTotal, -drebTotal, -rebTotal, -astTotal, -stlTotal, -blkTotal, -tovTotal, -pfTotal, -ptsScoredTotal, -plus_minusTotal) -> pomocna_tablica
nbaRS2 <- nbaRS %>%
  left_join(
    pomocna_tablica %>%
      select(game_date, season_id, team_id, CumGames, numberofWins, numberofLost, TeamWinPCT, fgPCT, fg3PCT, ftPCT, orebAvg, drebAvg, rebAvg, astAvg, stlAvg, blkAvg, tovAvg, pfAvg, ptsScoredAvg, ptsConcededAvg, plus_minusAvg) %>%
      rename(
        gamesPlayedHome = CumGames,
        numberofWinsHome = numberofWins,
        numberofLostHome = numberofLost,
        homeTeamWinPCT = TeamWinPCT,
        homeFGPCT = fgPCT,
        homeFG3PCT = fg3PCT,
        homeFTPCT = ftPCT,
        oRebAvgHome = orebAvg,
        dRebAvgHome = drebAvg,
        rebAvgHome = rebAvg,
        astAvgHome = astAvg,
        stlAvgHome = stlAvg,
        blkAvgHome = blkAvg,
        tovAvgHome = tovAvg,
        pfAvgHome = pfAvg,
        ptsScoredAvgHome = ptsScoredAvg,
        ptsConcededAvgHome = ptsConcededAvg,
        plus_minusAvgHome = plus_minusAvg
      ),
    by = c("game_date", "season_id", "team_id_home" = "team_id")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    pomocna_tablica %>%
      select(game_date, season_id, team_id, CumGames, numberofWins, numberofLost, TeamWinPCT, fgPCT, fg3PCT, ftPCT, orebAvg, drebAvg, rebAvg, astAvg, stlAvg, blkAvg, tovAvg, pfAvg, ptsScoredAvg, ptsConcededAvg, plus_minusAvg) %>%
      rename(
        gamesPlayedAway = CumGames,
        numberofWinsAway = numberofWins,
        numberofLostAway = numberofLost,
        awayTeamWinPCT = TeamWinPCT,
        awayFGPCT = fgPCT,
        awayFG3PCT = fg3PCT,
        awayFTPCT = ftPCT,
        oRebAvgAway = orebAvg,
        dRebAvgAway = drebAvg,
        rebAvgAway = rebAvg,
        astAvgAway = astAvg,
        stlAvgAway = stlAvg,
        blkAvgAway = blkAvg,
        tovAvgAway = tovAvg,
        pfAvgAway = pfAvg,
        ptsScoredAvgAway = ptsScoredAvg,
        ptsConcededAvgAway = ptsConcededAvg,
        plus_minusAvgAway = plus_minusAvg
      ),
    by = c("game_date", "season_id", "team_id_away" = "team_id")
  )

tail(nbaRS2, 1000)
## # A tibble: 1,000 × 88
##    season_id team_id_home team_abbreviation_home team_name_home         game_id 
##        <dbl>        <dbl> <chr>                  <chr>                  <chr>   
##  1     22022   1610612744 GSW                    Golden State Warriors  0022200…
##  2     22022   1610612747 LAL                    Los Angeles Lakers     0022200…
##  3     22022   1610612764 WAS                    Washington Wizards     0022200…
##  4     22022   1610612739 CLE                    Cleveland Cavaliers    0022200…
##  5     22022   1610612754 IND                    Indiana Pacers         0022200…
##  6     22022   1610612737 ATL                    Atlanta Hawks          0022200…
##  7     22022   1610612755 PHI                    Philadelphia 76ers     0022200…
##  8     22022   1610612757 POR                    Portland Trail Blazers 0022200…
##  9     22022   1610612746 LAC                    LA Clippers            0022200…
## 10     22022   1610612751 BKN                    Brooklyn Nets          0022200…
## # ℹ 990 more rows
## # ℹ 83 more variables: game_date <dttm>, matchup_home <chr>, wl_home <chr>,
## #   fgm_home <dbl>, fga_home <dbl>, fg_pct_home <dbl>, fg3m_home <dbl>,
## #   fg3a_home <dbl>, fg3_pct_home <dbl>, ftm_home <dbl>, fta_home <dbl>,
## #   ft_pct_home <dbl>, oreb_home <dbl>, dreb_home <dbl>, reb_home <dbl>,
## #   ast_home <dbl>, stl_home <dbl>, blk_home <dbl>, tov_home <dbl>,
## #   pf_home <dbl>, pts_home <dbl>, plus_minus_home <dbl>, team_id_away <dbl>, …

Međusobni omjer

Dodajem nove stupce za broj pobjeda svake ekipe u 10 posljednih međusobnih utakmica

Za to je koristan stupac matchup_home (ili away) koji je id za međusobne utakmice dviju ekipa

Problem: kratice pojedinih ekipa su se mijenjale kroz povijest te to prvo moramo riješiti.

nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("SAN", "SAS", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("CHH", "CHA", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("NOH", "NOP", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("NOK", "NOP", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("PHL", "PHI", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("UTH", "UTA", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("GOS", "GSW", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("NJN", "BKN", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
nbaRS2$matchup_home <- gsub("VAN", "MEM", nbaRS2$matchup_home)
#nbaRS2 %>% filter(matchup_home == "LAL vs. SAS")
#nbaRS2 %>% select(matchup_home) %>% group_by(matchup_home) %>% distinct() %>% arrange(matchup_home)

Sad kad je to riješeno, napravimo ta dva stupca.

nbaRS2 %>% group_by(matchup_home) %>% 
  mutate(
    homeH2HWins = lag(slide_dbl(ifelse(wl_home == "W", 1, 0), sum, .before = 9, .complete = FALSE), default = 0),
    awayH2HWins = lag(slide_dbl(ifelse(wl_home == "L", 1, 0), sum, .before = 9, .complete = FALSE), default = 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() -> nbaRS3

Najčešći matchupi

nbaRS3 %>% count(matchup_home) %>% arrange(desc(n))
## # A tibble: 928 × 2
##    matchup_home     n
##    <chr>        <int>
##  1 DAL vs. SAS     81
##  2 NYK vs. PHI     81
##  3 BOS vs. BKN     80
##  4 CHI vs. MIL     80
##  5 CLE vs. IND     80
##  6 HOU vs. DAL     80
##  7 CHI vs. DET     79
##  8 CLE vs. DET     79
##  9 DAL vs. HOU     79
## 10 DET vs. CHI     79
## # ℹ 918 more rows

Koliko često pobjeđuje momčad koja pogodi barem 25 trica kod kuće?

Odgovor: gotovo uvijek, samo jednom je takva momčad izgubila (LA Clippersi protiv Sacramento Kingsa).

nbaRS3 %>% filter(fg3m_home >= 25) %>% select(game_date, matchup_home, wl_home, fg3m_home)
## # A tibble: 24 × 4
##    game_date           matchup_home wl_home fg3m_home
##    <dttm>              <chr>        <chr>       <dbl>
##  1 2018-12-19 00:00:00 HOU vs. WAS  W              26
##  2 2019-01-19 00:00:00 HOU vs. LAL  W              25
##  3 2019-04-07 00:00:00 HOU vs. PHX  W              27
##  4 2019-11-30 00:00:00 HOU vs. ATL  W              25
##  5 2020-02-08 00:00:00 MIN vs. LAC  W              26
##  6 2020-08-01 00:00:00 LAC vs. NOP  W              25
##  7 2021-02-10 00:00:00 CHI vs. NOP  W              25
##  8 2021-02-12 00:00:00 DAL vs. NOP  W              25
##  9 2021-02-22 00:00:00 UTA vs. CHA  W              28
## 10 2021-04-03 00:00:00 UTA vs. ORL  W              26
## # ℹ 14 more rows

Dodan stupac ishoda utakmice (winner)

Ovo je stupac koji je cilj naše prediktivne analize.

nbaRS3 %>% mutate(winner = ifelse(wl_home == "W", "H", "A")) -> nbaRS3

Kreiranje data framea s konačnim podacima svake ekipe na kraju sezone

Kako bismo donositi bolje zaključke u eksploratornoj analizi, napravit ćemo data frame u kojemu ćemo imati konačne statistike svake momčadi na kraju svake regularne sezone za koje imamo dostupne podatke.

nbaRS4 <- nbaRS3 %>% filter(complete.cases(nbaRS3))

nbaRS5 <- nbaRS4 %>%
  mutate(
    team_id = team_id_home,
    team_name = team_name_home,
    opp_id = team_id_away,
    opp_name = team_name_away,
    gamesPlayed = gamesPlayedHome,
    numberofWins = numberofWinsHome,
    numberofLost = numberofLostHome,
    teamWinPCT = homeTeamWinPCT,
    FGPCT = homeFGPCT,
    FG3PCT = homeFG3PCT,
    FTPCT = homeFTPCT,
    oRebAvg = oRebAvgHome,
    dRebAvg = dRebAvgHome,
    rebAvg = rebAvgHome,
    astAvg = astAvgHome,
    stlAvg = stlAvgHome,
    blkAvg = blkAvgHome,
    tovAvg = tovAvgHome,
    pfAvg = pfAvgHome,
    ptsScoredAvg = ptsScoredAvgHome,
    ptsConcededAvg = ptsConcededAvgHome,
    plus_minusAvg = plus_minusAvgHome,
    wl = wl_home
  ) %>%
  select(game_date, season_id, team_id, team_name, opp_id, opp_name, game_id, matchup_home, gamesPlayed, numberofWins, numberofLost, teamWinPCT, FGPCT, FG3PCT, FTPCT, oRebAvg, dRebAvg, rebAvg, astAvg, stlAvg, blkAvg, tovAvg, pfAvg, ptsScoredAvg, ptsConcededAvg, plus_minusAvg, wl) %>%
  bind_rows(
    nbaRS4 %>%
      mutate(
        team_id = team_id_away,
        team_name = team_name_away,
        opp_id = team_id_home,
        opp_name = team_name_home,
        gamesPlayed = gamesPlayedAway,
        numberofWins = numberofWinsAway,
        numberofLost = numberofLostAway,
        teamWinPCT = awayTeamWinPCT,
        FGPCT = awayFGPCT,
        FG3PCT = awayFG3PCT,
        FTPCT = awayFTPCT,
        oRebAvg = oRebAvgAway,
        dRebAvg = dRebAvgAway,
        rebAvg = rebAvgAway,
        astAvg = astAvgAway,
        stlAvg = stlAvgAway,
        blkAvg = blkAvgAway,
        tovAvg = tovAvgAway,
        pfAvg = pfAvgAway,
        ptsScoredAvg = ptsScoredAvgAway,
        ptsConcededAvg = ptsConcededAvgAway,
        plus_minusAvg = plus_minusAvgAway,
        wl = wl_away
      ) %>%
      select(game_date, season_id, team_id, team_name, opp_id, opp_name, game_id, matchup_home, gamesPlayed, numberofWins, numberofLost, teamWinPCT, FGPCT, FG3PCT, FTPCT, oRebAvg, dRebAvg, rebAvg, astAvg, stlAvg, blkAvg, tovAvg, pfAvg, ptsScoredAvg, ptsConcededAvg, plus_minusAvg, wl)
  )
nbaRSFinal <- nbaRS5 %>% filter(gamesPlayed == 81 | (gamesPlayed == 71 & season_id == 22020) | (gamesPlayed == 65 & season_id == 22011)) %>% arrange(season_id, desc(numberofWins))

nbaRSFinal %>%
  mutate(
    gamesPlayed = gamesPlayed + 1,
    numberofWins = ifelse(wl == "W", numberofWins + 1, numberofWins),
    numberofLost = ifelse(wl == "W", numberofLost, numberofLost + 1)
  ) -> nbaRSFinal

nbaRSFinal <- nbaRSFinal %>% select(-game_date, -opp_id, -opp_name, -game_id, -matchup_home, -wl)

head(nbaRSFinal)
## # A tibble: 6 × 21
##   season_id   team_id team_name gamesPlayed numberofWins numberofLost teamWinPCT
##       <dbl>     <dbl> <chr>           <dbl>        <dbl>        <dbl>      <dbl>
## 1     21987    1.61e9 Los Ange…          82           62           20      0.753
## 2     21987    1.61e9 Dallas M…          82           53           29      0.642
## 3     21988    1.61e9 Chicago …          82           47           35      0.58 
## 4     21988    1.61e9 Sacramen…          82           27           55      0.333
## 5     21988    1.61e9 New Jers…          82           26           56      0.321
## 6     21989    1.61e9 Chicago …          82           55           27      0.679
## # ℹ 14 more variables: FGPCT <dbl>, FG3PCT <dbl>, FTPCT <dbl>, oRebAvg <dbl>,
## #   dRebAvg <dbl>, rebAvg <dbl>, astAvg <dbl>, stlAvg <dbl>, blkAvg <dbl>,
## #   tovAvg <dbl>, pfAvg <dbl>, ptsScoredAvg <dbl>, ptsConcededAvg <dbl>,
## #   plus_minusAvg <dbl>
nbaRSFinal %>% count(season_id)
## # A tibble: 33 × 2
##    season_id     n
##        <dbl> <int>
##  1     21987     2
##  2     21988     3
##  3     21989     4
##  4     21990     7
##  5     21991    14
##  6     21992    20
##  7     21993    20
##  8     21994    27
##  9     21995    29
## 10     21996    29
## # ℹ 23 more rows

Sad kad smo uspjeli napraviti data frame koji sadrži konačne statistike momčadi na kraju sezone, možemo krenuti u vizualizaciju podataka.

Vizualizacija podataka

Istražujemo kako koja statistika utječe na konačni ishod utakmice.

Povezanost broja skokova i asistencija s ishodom utakmice

reb_melted <- melt(nbaRS4, id.vars = "winner", measure.vars = c("reb_home", "reb_away"),
                     variable.name = "Team", value.name = "reb")

ggplot(reb_melted, aes(x = winner, y = reb, fill = Team)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + 
  labs(title = "Prosječan broj skokova prema ishodu utakmice",
       x = "Ishod utakmice",
       y = "Prosječan broj skokova",
       fill = "Tim") +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Domaći", "Gosti"), values = c("dodgerblue", "firebrick1")) +
  theme_minimal() -> g1
ast_melted <- melt(nbaRS4, id.vars = "winner", measure.vars = c("ast_home", "ast_away"),
                     variable.name = "Team", value.name = "ast")

ggplot(ast_melted, aes(x = winner, y = ast, fill = Team)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + 
  labs(title = "Broj asistencija prema ishodu utakmice",
       x = "Ishod utakmice",
       y = "Broj asistencija",
       fill = "Tim") +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Domaći", "Gosti"), values = c("dodgerblue", "firebrick1")) +
  theme_minimal() -> g2

Povezanost postotka šuta za 3 i ishoda utakmice

three_point_data <- nbaRS4 %>%
  select(winner, fg3m_home, fg3_pct_home, fg3m_away, fg3_pct_away) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -winner,
    names_to = c(".value", "team_type"),
    names_pattern = "(fg3m|fg3_pct)_(home|away)"
  )

ggplot(three_point_data, aes(x = team_type, y = fg3_pct, fill = team_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~winner) +
  labs(title = "Usporedba postotka trica po tipu tima i ishodu utakmice",
       x = "Ishod utakmice",
       y = "Broj trica",
       fill = "Tim") +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Domaći", "Gosti"), values = c("dodgerblue", "firebrick1")) +
  theme_minimal() -> g3

grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3)

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = FG3PCT, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)) +
  labs(title = "Povezanost postotka šuta za 3 s postotkom pobjeda",
       x = "Postotak trica",
       y = "Postotak pobjeda") +
  theme_minimal() -> g4
ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = FG3PCT)) + 
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, fill = "dodgerblue", color = "black") +
  labs(x = "Postotak šuta za 3", y = "Broj timova", title = "Histogram postotka šuta za 3") +
  theme_minimal()

Što bolje momčad šutira, to je vjerojatnije da će ta momčad biti bolja. Uočavamo da na kraju histogram postotka šuta za tri poena vuče čak na normalnu razdiobu.

Korelacija postotka pobjeda i broja postignutih koševa

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = ptsScoredAvg, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)) +
  labs(title = "Povezanost prosječnog broja koševa s postotkom pobjeda",
       x = "Prosječan broj postignutih koševa",
       y = "Postotak pobjeda") +
  theme_minimal() -> g1

Korelacija postotka pobjeda i broja primljenih koševa

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = ptsConcededAvg, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)) +
  labs(title = "Povezanost prosječnog broja primljenih koševa s postotkom pobjeda",
       x = "Prosječan broj primljenih koševa",
       y = "Postotak pobjeda") +
  theme_minimal() -> g2

Napad dobija utakmice, a obrana prvenstva. Ova posljednja dva grafa to potvrđuju. Vidimo da je korelacija između postotka pobjeda i primljenih poena jača nego ona između postotka pobjeda i postignutih poena.

Korelacija postotka pobjeda i plus/minus statistike

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = plus_minusAvg, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1, scale = 100)) +
  labs(title = "Povezanost prosječne koš razlike s postotkom pobjeda",
       x = "Prosječna koš razlika",
       y = "Postotak pobjeda") +
  theme_minimal() -> g3

grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3, g4, nrow = 2, ncol = 2)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Momčadi koje imaju oboje, naravno, postižu najbolje rezultate. Tako da, potpuno očekivano, korelacija između plus/minus statistike (prosječna koš razlika po utakmici) i postotka pobjede je velika.

Graf postignutih i primljenih koševa ovisno o postotku pobjeda

ptsScoredMean = mean(nbaRSFinal$ptsScoredAvg)
ptsConcededMean = mean(nbaRSFinal$ptsConcededAvg)

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = ptsConcededAvg, y = ptsScoredAvg, alpha = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "blue") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = ptsConcededMean), color = "red") +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = ptsScoredMean), color = "red") +
  geom_abline(aes(intercept = 0, slope = 1), color = "red") +
  theme_minimal()

Graf broja asistencija o postotku pobjeda

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = astAvg, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() -> g1

Graf ovisnosti broja izgubljenih lopti o postotku pobjeda

ggplot(nbaRSFinal, aes(x = tovAvg, y = teamWinPCT)) + 
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() -> g2

grid.arrange(g1, g2)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Modeli za predviđanje

Bez prvih 5

nbaRS0 <- nbaRS4 %>% filter(gamesPlayedHome > 5) %>% select(team_name_home, team_name_away, game_date, matchup_home, homeTeamWinPCT, homeFGPCT, homeFG3PCT, homeFTPCT, oRebAvgHome, dRebAvgHome, rebAvgHome, astAvgHome, stlAvgHome, blkAvgHome, tovAvgHome, pfAvgHome, plus_minusAvgHome, awayTeamWinPCT, awayFGPCT, awayFG3PCT, awayFTPCT, oRebAvgAway, dRebAvgAway, rebAvgAway, astAvgAway, stlAvgAway, blkAvgAway, tovAvgAway, pfAvgAway, plus_minusAvgAway, homeH2HWins, awayH2HWins, winner)
nbaRS0

##  3 Portland Trai… Seattle Super… 1985-11-08 00:00:00 POR vs. SEA           0.714
##  4 Dallas Maveri… Houston Rocke… 1985-11-09 00:00:00 DAL vs. HOU           0.333
##  5 New Jersey Ne… Milwaukee Buc… 1985-11-09 00:00:00 BKN vs. MIL           0.667
##  6 Detroit Pisto… Boston Celtics 1985-11-09 00:00:00 DET vs. BOS           0.714
##  7 Portland Trai… Cleveland Cav… 1985-11-10 00:00:00 POR vs. CLE           0.75 
##  8 Golden State … Sacramento Ki… 1985-11-10 00:00:00 GSW vs. SAC           0.333
##  9 San Antonio S… New Jersey Ne… 1985-11-11 00:00:00 SAS vs. BKN           0.5  
## 10 Detroit Pisto… Washington Bu… 1985-11-12 00:00:00 DET vs. WAS           0.625
## # ℹ 38,638 more rows

Bez prvih 10

nbaRS10 <- nbaRS4 %>% filter(gamesPlayedHome > 10) %>% select(team_name_home, team_name_away, game_date, matchup_home, homeTeamWinPCT, homeFGPCT, homeFG3PCT, homeFTPCT, oRebAvgHome, dRebAvgHome, rebAvgHome, astAvgHome, stlAvgHome, blkAvgHome, tovAvgHome, pfAvgHome, plus_minusAvgHome, awayTeamWinPCT, awayFGPCT, awayFG3PCT, awayFTPCT, oRebAvgAway, dRebAvgAway, rebAvgAway, astAvgAway, stlAvgAway, blkAvgAway, tovAvgAway, pfAvgAway, plus_minusAvgAway, homeH2HWins, awayH2HWins, winner)
nbaRS10
## # A tibble: 36,028 × 33
##    team_name_home team_name_away game_date           matchup_home homeTeamWinPCT

##  2 Milwaukee Buc… Chicago Bulls  1985-11-15 00:00:00 MIL vs. CHI           0.667
##  3 Portland Trai… New Jersey Ne… 1985-11-19 00:00:00 POR vs. BKN           0.636
##  4 Chicago Bulls  Indiana Pacers 1985-11-19 00:00:00 CHI vs. IND           0.364
##  5 Dallas Maveri… Phoenix Suns   1985-11-19 00:00:00 DAL vs. PHX           0.364
##  6 Phoenix Suns   San Antonio S… 1985-11-20 00:00:00 PHX vs. SAS           0.091
##  7 Denver Nuggets Los Angeles L… 1985-11-21 00:00:00 DEN vs. LAL           0.818
##  8 San Antonio S… Indiana Pacers 1985-11-22 00:00:00 SAS vs. IND           0.455
##  9 Detroit Pisto… Golden State … 1985-11-22 00:00:00 DET vs. GSW           0.545
## 10 Cleveland Cav… Utah Jazz      1985-11-22 00:00:00 CLE vs. UTA           0.364
## # ℹ 36,018 more rows
## # ℹ 28 more variables: homeFGPCT <dbl>, homeFG3PCT <dbl>, homeFTPCT <dbl>,
## #   oRebAvgHome <dbl>, dRebAvgHome <dbl>, rebAvgHome <dbl>, astAvgHome <dbl>,
## #   stlAvgHome <dbl>, blkAvgHome <dbl>, tovAvgHome <dbl>, pfAvgHome <dbl>,
## #   plus_minusAvgHome <dbl>, awayTeamWinPCT <dbl>, awayFGPCT <dbl>,
## #   awayFG3PCT <dbl>, awayFTPCT <dbl>, oRebAvgAway <dbl>, dRebAvgAway <dbl>,
## #   rebAvgAway <dbl>, astAvgAway <dbl>, stlAvgAway <dbl>, blkAvgAway <dbl>, …
nbaRS0 %>% count(winner)
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   winner     n
##   <chr>  <int>
## 1 A      15363
## 2 H      23285

Normalizacija podataka

nbaRSNorm <- lapply(nbaRS0, function(x) {
  if(is.numeric(x)) (x - mean(x)) / sd(x)
  else x
}) %>% as.data.frame
nbaRSNorm1 <- lapply(nbaRS10, function(x) {
  if(is.numeric(x)) (x - mean(x)) / sd(x)
  else x
}) %>% as.data.frame

Podjela na trening i test podatke

Bez prvih 5

trainingSet <- nbaRSNorm[1:27053,c(6:32)]
testSet <- nbaRSNorm[27054:38648,c(6:32)]

trainingOutcomes <- nbaRSNorm[1:27053,33]
testOutcomes <- nbaRSNorm[27054:38648,33]

trainingOutcomes <- as.factor(trainingOutcomes)
testOutcomes <- as.factor(testOutcomes)

Bez prvih 10

trainingSet <- nbaRSNorm1[1:25219,c(6:32)]
testSet <- nbaRSNorm1[25220:36028,c(6:32)]

trainingOutcomes <- nbaRSNorm1[1:25219,33]
testOutcomes <- nbaRSNorm1[25220:36028,33]

trainingOutcomes <- as.factor(trainingOutcomes)
testOutcomes <- as.factor(testOutcomes)

Random forest

set.seed(3000)
model <- randomForest(x = trainingSet, y = trainingOutcomes, ntree = 1000, mtry = 3, classwt = c(A = 1, H = 2), keep.forest = TRUE)
predictions <- predict(model, newdata = testSet)

accuracy <- mean(predictions == testOutcomes)
print(paste("Accuracy:", accuracy))
## [1] "Accuracy: 0.648441113886576"
cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
## ------------------------------------------------------------
conf_matrix <- table(Predicted = predictions, Actual = testOutcomes)
print(conf_matrix)
##          Actual
## Predicted    A    H
##         A 2079 1259
##         H 2541 4930

Support Vector Machine

svm_model <- svm(x = trainingSet, y = trainingOutcomes, 
                 kernel = "radial")
predictions <- predict(svm_model, newdata = testSet)

accuracy <- mean(predictions == testOutcomes)
print(paste("Accuracy:", accuracy))
## [1] "Accuracy: 0.637246738828754"
cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
## ------------------------------------------------------------
conf_matrix <- table(Predicted = predictions, Actual = testOutcomes)
print(conf_matrix)
##          Actual
## Predicted    A    H
##         A 1633  934
##         H 2987 5255

Logistička regresija

model <- multinom(trainingOutcomes ~ ., data = trainingSet)
## # weights:  29 (28 variable)
## initial  value 17480.478747 
## iter  10 value 14767.023511
## iter  20 value 14755.764206
## iter  30 value 14669.323469
## iter  40 value 14668.220364
## final  value 14667.288855 
## converged
predictions <- predict(model, newdata = testSet)

accuracy <- mean(predictions == testOutcomes)
print(paste("Accuracy:", accuracy))
## [1] "Accuracy: 0.650013877324452"
cat("------------------------------------------------------------\n")
## ------------------------------------------------------------
conf_matrix <- table(Predicted = predictions, Actual = testOutcomes)
print(conf_matrix)
##          Actual
## Predicted    A    H
##         A 1931 1094
##         H 2689 5095
